validated_gaps.title: Unified Agent Identity Lifecycle Platform (Create-to-Revoke)

demand_signals.source: HN: How are you handling identities for AI agents?

demand_signals.quote_summary: 40% of orgs can't discover/register agents; 12% don't know how agents authenticate

demand_signals.quote_summary: Agents described as 'powerful, invisible, and unmanaged' identity dark matter
